meta.description: Shared private-sector role catalog used across Salary Explorer, Skill Gap, Plan B, and Mentor Connect for metro-focused role guidance.
meta.disclaimer: All salary ranges and demand signals are indicative. Verify current openings, compensation, and role expectations from official company pages and trusted job platforms.

roles.title: Sales Executive (B2B / Inside Sales)
roles.summary: Handles lead outreach, product pitching, demos, and follow-up conversion for business clients.
roles.eligibility_min: Any graduate with basic communication and spreadsheet comfort
roles.eligibility_preferred: BBA/BCom or prior internship in sales or customer-facing role

metro_map.city_reality_note: Large market and high target pressure; communication quality strongly affects growth.
Strong in B2B industrial segments; consistent follow-up matters more than flashy pitching.
SaaS-heavy hiring; interviewers expect comfort with outbound metrics and CRM usage.
Inside-sales and tech-sales roles are common; multilingual communication can help.
Mid-market and IT service sales are frequent; process consistency is valued.
Fast-paced market with variable incentives; commute and territory planning affect productivity.

day_0_30: Build a one-page pitch for one product category.
Learn basic CRM tracking using sample lead data.
day_31_60: Practice 20 cold-call openers and objection responses.
Run a mock weekly sales pipeline review.
day_61_90: Apply to 40 targeted roles with tailored resume bullets.
Request at least 10 referrals from alumni and known contacts.

roles.data_freshness_note: Compensation includes fixed + variable structures in many firms. Verify current offer structure before accepting.

roles.title: Customer Support Associate
roles.summary: Resolves user issues via chat, email, and calls while maintaining SLA and customer satisfaction targets.
roles.eligibility_min: 12th pass or graduate with basic English and typing speed
roles.eligibility_preferred: Graduate with prior support or process exposure

metro_map.city_reality_note: Large support ecosystem; shift readiness and communication are key filters.
Steady process hiring; consistency in QA scores can accelerate growth.
Product support exposure helps long-term transition to operations or customer success.
Strong GCC and process hiring; language and SLA discipline matter.
Shared-service roles are common; non-voice processes often need stronger writing.
High volume processes; commute planning is important for late shifts.

day_0_30: Practice written responses to 30 common support issues.
Improve typing speed and grammar consistency.
day_31_60: Learn ticket triage workflow and escalation logic.
Complete mock QA feedback cycles with a peer.
day_61_90: Apply to voice and non-voice roles across 5 target companies.
Track interview outcomes and improve weak areas weekly.

roles.data_freshness_note: Process-level compensation can change quickly with shift policies and client mandates.

roles.title: Operations Associate
roles.summary: Executes daily business processes, reporting, coordination, and workflow handoffs across teams.
roles.eligibility_min: Graduate with spreadsheet and process discipline
roles.eligibility_preferred: BBA/BCom/BSc with internship in operations or back office

metro_map.city_reality_note: High role volume; process consistency and reliability are primary drivers.
Operations-heavy industries value quality compliance and reporting hygiene.
Startup and GCC ops roles reward ownership and turnaround speed.
Strong process hiring pipelines; interviewers probe problem-solving under SLA pressure.
Shared-service and finance ops roles are common and stable.
BFSI-linked operations can offer faster growth with stricter performance expectations.

day_0_30: Create sample daily operations tracker in spreadsheet.
Learn 10 core process metrics (TAT, SLA, error rate).
day_31_60: Practice root-cause analysis on 3 mock process issues.
Prepare SOP-style documentation sample.
day_61_90: Apply to 35 operations roles across company and platform channels.
Do 5 mock interviews focused on process scenarios.

roles.data_freshness_note: Ops designations vary by company; compare role responsibilities before salary comparison.

roles.title: MIS Executive
roles.summary: Builds periodic reports, dashboards, and operational insights for decision-making teams.
roles.eligibility_min: Graduate with Excel and reporting comfort
roles.eligibility_preferred: BCom/BSc/BBA with Excel and BI exposure

metro_map.city_reality_note: High demand in sales and operations teams; data accuracy is non-negotiable.
Stable demand in manufacturing and shared services reporting.
Tool proficiency with BI stack improves growth significantly.
Reporting and process analytics demand remains steady in GCC setups.
MIS + finance operations combinations are common.
Fast reporting cycles demand strong time discipline and error control.

day_0_30: Master key Excel functions and pivot reporting.
Build one monthly performance dashboard sample.
day_31_60: Add Power BI dashboard and one SQL-based report.
Create an error-check checklist for reports.
day_61_90: Apply to 30 MIS/reporting roles with portfolio links.
Practice task-based interviews with timed exercises.

roles.data_freshness_note: Many firms use title variants (MIS, Reporting, Data Ops). Compare role scope before applying.

roles.title: Junior Data Analyst
roles.summary: Transforms raw business data into reports and actionable insights for product, operations, and management teams.
roles.eligibility_min: Graduate with SQL and spreadsheet basics

metro_map.city_reality_note: Strong BFSI and consulting demand for reporting and analytics roles.
Steady enterprise analytics opportunities with process-heavy workflows.
Portfolio depth and SQL rigor are heavily tested.
GCC and product setups often hire analytics juniors with strong fundamentals.
Roles often blend reporting and stakeholder communication responsibilities.
Finance and media analytics roles can demand fast turnaround and high accuracy.

day_0_30: Complete SQL basics and one reporting project.
Publish one dashboard with business narrative.
day_31_60: Build second project with data cleaning and KPI framing.
Practice 20 SQL interview questions.
day_61_90: Apply to 40 analyst roles with tailored portfolio links.
Track interview feedback and close weak skill gaps.

roles.data_freshness_note: Top salary bands usually require strong project depth or niche domain skills.

roles.title: Digital Marketing Executive
roles.summary: Runs campaigns, SEO/SEM tasks, ad optimization, and social content performance tracking.
roles.eligibility_min: Any graduate with strong writing and campaign learning intent
roles.eligibility_preferred: Portfolio of campaign simulations or internship work

metro_map.city_reality_note: Agency and D2C demand is high; measurable results improve offer quality.
Content and local-language marketing capability can differentiate candidates.
Growth and product marketing exposure can accelerate transitions.
Performance marketing skills are commonly preferred in interviews.
SMB and SaaS marketing roles can offer broad learning scope.
Media and brand ecosystems reward fast campaign iteration and reporting.

day_0_30: Complete one SEO and one ads fundamentals certification.
Create a sample campaign plan for one category.
day_31_60: Run a small-budget campaign simulation and analyze outcomes.
Build a portfolio deck of 2-3 marketing case studies.
day_61_90: Apply to 35 agency/in-house marketing roles.
Reach out to 10 hiring managers with portfolio summary.

roles.data_freshness_note: Marketing salaries vary by campaign ownership and performance-linked incentives.

roles.title: Content Associate
roles.summary: Creates blogs, product copy, social content, and SEO-aligned articles for digital channels.
roles.eligibility_min: Any graduate with writing sample quality
roles.eligibility_preferred: Portfolio with domain-specific writing and SEO awareness

metro_map.city_reality_note: Strong content demand in education, policy, and startup ecosystems.
Domain writing and quality consistency help role stability.
Tech and SaaS writing opportunities are strong with portfolio-backed candidates.
Content + marketing hybrid roles are common in growth-stage firms.
Edtech and SaaS writing can offer good entry opportunities.
Media and brand ecosystems prioritize speed and editorial quality.

day_0_30: Create 3 writing samples across different formats.
Learn basic SEO structure and headline writing.
day_31_60: Build one niche-focused mini-portfolio site.
Edit and improve pieces based on peer feedback.
day_61_90: Apply to 40 content roles and internships.
Send direct outreach with two best writing samples.

roles.data_freshness_note: Pay varies significantly by domain specialization and writing quality benchmark.

roles.title: HR Recruiter (Entry)
roles.summary: Sources candidates, screens resumes, coordinates interviews, and supports hiring funnels.
roles.eligibility_min: Graduate with communication and coordination skills
roles.eligibility_preferred: BBA/MBA(HR) or internship in talent acquisition

metro_map.city_reality_note: Recruitment consulting and in-house roles both available; metrics are tightly tracked.
Volume hiring in services creates stable entry opportunities.
Tech hiring cycles can be competitive; sourcing skill quality matters.
GCC and services hiring support steady recruiter demand.
Balanced mix of in-house and agency opportunities.
BFSI and corporate hiring cycles can create high-pressure timelines.

day_0_30: Learn role screening basics and common hiring metrics.
Create a sample candidate tracker and email templates.
day_31_60: Practice mock screening calls and interview scheduling workflows.
Learn ATS basics and sourcing methods.
day_61_90: Apply to 30 recruiter roles and 20 recruiting internships.
Build referral outreach to current recruiters on LinkedIn.

roles.data_freshness_note: Recruiting compensation can include variable components tied to closure and hiring targets.

roles.title: Finance Operations Associate
roles.summary: Supports reconciliations, invoice processing, reporting, and compliance workflows in finance teams.
roles.eligibility_preferred: BCom/BBA/MCom or internship in finance operations

metro_map.city_reality_note: BFSI and enterprise shared-services drive continuous demand.
Steady hiring in accounting and captive finance processes.
Global process centers often expect process and system agility.
Finance shared-services roles remain a stable entry path.
Good volume in global business services and captive centers.
Higher opportunities but also stronger competition from finance-focused candidates.

day_0_30: Refresh accounting basics and Excel reconciliation workflows.
Create one sample monthly close tracker.
day_31_60: Practice finance process interview scenarios.
Learn one ERP workflow concept and terminology.
day_61_90: Apply to 35 finance ops roles with role-specific resume keywords.
Request referrals from alumni in BFSI/shared services.

roles.data_freshness_note: Role responsibilities differ by organization; validate whether posting is accounting, reporting, or transaction-heavy.

roles.title: Logistics Coordinator
roles.summary: Coordinates shipments, delivery timelines, vendor communication, and fulfillment issue resolution.
roles.eligibility_min: Graduate with process discipline and communication
roles.eligibility_preferred: Commerce/operations background with ERP or logistics exposure

metro_map.city_reality_note: Strong e-commerce and warehousing ecosystem creates regular openings.
Manufacturing and port-linked logistics roles are common.
City-scale delivery and fulfillment operations support stable demand.
Growing warehousing and pharma supply chains provide opportunities.
Auto and industrial logistics coordination roles are frequent.
Port-adjacent and high-volume logistics operations can involve tighter timelines.

day_0_30: Learn supply chain terminology and fulfillment KPIs.
Build sample dispatch and tracking sheet.
day_31_60: Practice escalation and delay-management scenarios.
Understand basic warehouse and transit workflow.
day_61_90: Apply to 30 logistics roles plus 15 operations support roles.
Create targeted resume emphasizing reliability and coordination.

roles.data_freshness_note: Compensation varies by field intensity, location coverage, and shift requirements.

roles.title: QA / Test Associate
roles.summary: Tests software features, reports defects, validates fixes, and supports release quality checks.
roles.eligibility_min: Graduate with logical reasoning and basic software understanding

metro_map.city_reality_note: Service and product firms both hire; assignment performance matters.
Strong IT services ecosystem with predictable entry-level opportunities.
Automation readiness can significantly improve growth trajectory.
GCC and product hiring create steady quality roles.
Service and captive tech centers hire QA for large delivery teams.
Roles available but competition can be stronger for product-oriented teams.

day_0_30: Learn test case fundamentals and defect lifecycle.
Test one sample web app and document defects.
day_31_60: Build API testing basics and regression checklist.
Prepare short testing portfolio with screenshots.
day_61_90: Apply to 40 QA/test roles with project evidence.
Practice assignment-style interviews weekly.

roles.data_freshness_note: QA demand remains strong, but automation literacy increasingly affects compensation and growth.

roles.title: Business Development Associate
roles.summary: Builds pipeline through outreach, discovery calls, and qualification for revenue and growth teams.
roles.eligibility_preferred: Internship in sales, growth, or customer-facing function

metro_map.city_reality_note: Large B2B and education sales market with aggressive targets.
Steady growth in enterprise and industrial client acquisition roles.
SaaS-driven sales development roles can scale quickly with performance.
High hiring across inside-sales and growth teams.
Balanced demand in IT, education, and service-sector growth teams.
Large sales market with higher upside but sharper performance expectations.

day_0_30: Prepare one outreach script and one discovery-call checklist.
Practice product explanation in 60-second format.
day_31_60: Simulate lead qualification and CRM updates for 20 mock prospects.
Practice objection handling with peer mock calls.
day_61_90: Apply to 40 BDA roles with role-targeted resume points.
Use referral outreach to increase interview conversion.

roles.data_freshness_note: Incentive-heavy roles can alter total earnings materially. Confirm fixed vs variable split before joining.
